title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Holdem, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Speed, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: One blow to a head- liner!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't stop! Head straight to the gate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone like you, defeated in one blow?! Who is that man?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyaaaah! Who is that?! Being embraced like this...:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait... the hell are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WA-?! I can't! It doesn't work on Huma-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Probably cause this thing's half horse!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, Umami! Follow that treasure ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Erm... We'd like you to follow'n it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have they taken advantage of a weakness of hers?!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
